name: Turtle Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt caramel and evaporated milk together until smooth.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the cake mix with milk, chopped pecans, and melted butter.
3. Pour the cake batter into the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking pan to cover it completely.
4. Spread the remaining batter evenly over the top of the cake.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and immediately sprinkle chocolate chips over the hot cake.
7. Top with additional melted caramel mixture.
8. Crumble some of the remaining cake batter over the top, if desired, but do not cover all.
9. Return to the oven and bake at 350°F for an additional 25 minutes.
10. Ensure the cake does not overbake.
11. Allow the cake to cool completely before cutting or serving.
